item.name: Send Advanced Power Action - EnforceSecureBoot false in CCM

exec: // This test validates the CCM restriction for EnforceSecureBoot
// When a device is in Client Control Mode (CCM), EnforceSecureBoot cannot be turned off
// Expected: 400 Bad Request with error message about CCM restriction
// Note: This test requires a device in CCM mode to properly validate
// 400 = CCM restriction error (expected for CCM device)
// 404 = Device not found (if no device configured)
